title: B2B Account Service Agent — Agentforce SE Interview Demo
description: Full-stack Agentforce EinsteinCopilot demo built for Salesforce Lead Agentforce SE interviews. 4 topics: account health lookup, P1/P2/P3 case auto-routing, opportunity status, activity scheduling. 4 Apex actions + AgentScript deterministic routing (internal user gate + severity router) — the Spring 26 interview differentiator most candidates won't show. Demo runs 4-5 min, creates 3 record types.
metric: 4-topic demo covering Account + Case + Opportunity + Activity — full CRM object coverage in 5 min
notes: Scored 8/10. High-demand Agentforce + AgentScript (Spring 26). SA-level complexity. Novel: deterministic routing differentiator. Pending: sub-agent build completion verification. Code location: ~/projects/agentforce-agent/agentforce-project/

title: PM Operations Agent
reason: InternalCopilot Agentforce build with 4 PM workflows, 95% test coverage, paired with existing PM Tenant Agent for full-suite demo story. Directly targets Salesforce AI roles.

title: AI Multi-Channel Support Triage (n8n)
description: 21-node n8n workflow: Claude classifies inbound support tickets by priority, category, churn risk, and VIP status. Routes CRITICAL/URGENT to Slack escalation + agent email; STANDARD to auto-response + digest. Live Sheets logging. Handles enterprise-to-starter tier SLA differentiation.

title: AI Insurance Claims Triage & Document Extraction
description: n8n workflow where Claude extracts structured fields from claim submissions, auto-classifies by severity (routine/elevated/urgent), routes urgent claims to Slack escalation + Salesforce Case creation, and sends auto-acknowledgment emails — targeting the insurance vertical with zero manual review.
metric: Auto-classifies claim severity and routes to correct channel in under 30 seconds
notes: Scored 8/10. Real n8n demo for insurance niche. Claude does structured extraction from unstructured claim text — high SA hiring signal. COVU target demo. Build: ~/projects/n8n-agent/clients/insurance-claims-demo/
note: Card live on jtsomwaru.com under ai-insurance-claims-triage / ai-lead-qualification (added 2026-03-06). Pending_build status was stale orphan.

title: AI Lead Qualification & HubSpot CRM Entry
description: n8n workflow where Claude scores inbound leads on budget fit, timeline, and needs match — routing high-quality leads to HubSpot contact creation with personalized intro emails, and low-fit leads to nurture sequences. All decisions logged to Sheets audit trail.
metric: Eliminates manual lead review — AI scores every inbound lead with structured reasoning and routes automatically
notes: Scored 8/10. HubSpot + Claude lead scoring = strongest employer signal of any workflow type per task description. Shows AI making real business decisions inside n8n. Build: ~/projects/n8n-agent/clients/lead-qualification-demo/
note: Card live on jtsomwaru.com under ai-insurance-claims-triage / ai-lead-qualification (added 2026-03-06). Pending_build status was stale orphan.
